title: deny WebSearch は除去型(init tools から消える・denials 空)

probes.prompt: Use only the WebSearch tool to run a web search for "example domain reserved documentation". If the search returns results, reply with ONLY WS_OK. If the tool call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY WS_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: bare ツール名 deny は除去型で確実に効く。WebFetch の domain deny(a)と併せ、取得系 2 ツールは permission 層で個別に塞げる(sandbox network は両方迂回される=S6-h の層と対)。
